title: HCat
description: Cats WANT Hats! Replaces a boring collar
body:
![Description0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b425899b2c8af90db94a29ee9f811439143bbee6.png)
> ## 🇬🇧 English
>  • HCat is a must-have for every respectable Minecraft player  
>  • Every cat wants a fashionable hat, don't be mean, give them what they want  
>  • Hats can be dyed with all available dyes  
>  • Replaces the collar  
  
> ## 🇷🇺 Russian
> • HCat нужен каждому уважаемому игроку Майнкрафт  
> • Каждый кот желает себе модную шляпу, не будьте злыми, дайте что они хотят  
> • Шляпы можно красить всеми доступными красителями  
> • Заменяет ошейник
 
> ![GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b83fc3501e944fd27bfe6b0b02226bf46746d00f.gif)

This resource pack uses an OptiFine feature called custom entity models (CEM) to add new models  
IT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THIS FEATURE!  
As an alternative to Optifine, the combination of Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features can be used for CEM features  

[![optifinebutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9be01fbec741b58130465f7b41e4a69e8dd1b764.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)  

[![EMFbutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e70568674b5ba0661c092ffc008033f8dabb9e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
[![ETFbutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6c4e7d9d9b4df93cdd371141e15202206a5c57.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)  

**DOESN'T WORK WITH FRESH ANIMATION**   

 [![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b2bad882a6e621e493a2c4abfd08be334f5954.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hcat_) [![cursrforgebutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7792b5202ddf154475892357f437963d5515d3c1.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hcat)
